post_rendered:
ꅐꑀ꒒ꏳꊿꂵꑀ ꋖꊿ ꂵꁲꊯ꒐ꁲ ꁅꁲꂵꑀ ꀨꈔꍌ: ꈜ꒒ꑀꑀꉣ ꋖꊿꈵꑀꃔ ꂵꁲꊯ꒐ꁲ



Nothing lasts forever.

Rules
  • Rules
    • 1.1: Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • 1.2: Do not post at night.
    • 1.3: You may PM me at any time and ask me anything, such as rule clarification.
    • 1.4: Do not talk about this game outside of this topic or the mafia chat to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless I specifically allow you to do so.
    • 1.5: You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others. This does not include adding extra spaces.
    • 1.6: Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted; this includes editing right after you post (what goes in the thread stays in the thread). If you for any reason find the need to change your post, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • 1.7: If you are not a living participant of the game, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • 1.8: Do not advocate for breaking the rules.
    • 1.10: Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the moderator, including role PMs. To verify your existence, name a song from the album This Place Will Become Your Tomb.
    • 1.9: Out of game information and angleshooting are extremely banned. If you are unsure whether something breaks this rule, ask me in your role PM or just don't do it.
    • 1.10: Do not claim or otherwise discuss your flavorname.
  • Voting/Hanging
    • 2.1: Post votes in bold or code tags in the format 
      [b]Vote: <insert player here>[/b]
      or 
      [code]Vote: <insert player here>[/‎code]

      Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. A proper vote looks like Vote: fdas or 
      Vote: fdas
    • 2.2: Votes may not be placed in hide tags.
    • 2.3: Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until I made the official end of the game post.
    • 2.4: You may vote for no hang to occur during a day. Vote this by including in your post: Vote: No Hang or 
      Vote: No Hang
    • 2.5: Unvote in the format Vote: Unvote or 
      Vote: Unvote

      An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any. You are not required to unvote before making a new vote.
    • 2.6: Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly. Do not use nicknames.
    • 2.7: If at any point in a day more than half of the votes are for a single player, that player will be hanged. It will then immediately be twilight.
    • 2.8: If at any point in a day at least half of the votes are for no hang, then there will be no hang. It will then be twilight.
    • 2.9: If the deadline is met, the player with the highest number of votes will be hanged. If two or more players have the same amount of votes, the hang will be randomized between these players. If no hang is tied with a player or players, there will be no hang.
    • 2.10: The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post.
    • 2.11: During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • 2.12: Once I post an end-of-day scene, the person hanged (if any) is officially dead. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.
    • 2.13: People are hanged, not hung. While this wording entertains me, it is also slightly painful to see.
  • Activity
    • 3.1: Each day will be 192 hours (8 days). The moderator may extend the deadline for the end of the day at their discretion. Note that this will be unlikely.
    • 3.2: The deadline will occur the very second 192 hours has occurred.
    • 3.3: The night deadline will be 48 hours after night begins.
    • 3.4: When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or their partner(s) (if applicable), the player will lose the chance to perform an action during that night.
    • 3.5: Any night results will be sent after the night deadline.
    • 3.6: Night will end at some time after the night deadline when the mod makes the post announcing the end of night.
    • 3.7: If a player does not post in a 48-hour period and they are not in V/LA, they will receive an in-game prod.
    • 3.8: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and they are not in V/LA, they will receive a PM prod.
    • 3.9: If a player does not post in another 24-hour period after receiving a PM prod and they are not in V/LA, they will be replaced unless they post before the moderator finds a replacement.
    • 3.10: If a player receives 5 PM Prods, they will be replaced.
    • 3.11: To request a V/LA, post in bold in-thread or PM me. The moderator will not prod the player during their V/LA as long as it is within reason. If you need to take an excessively long V/LA, you may be encouraged to replace out of the game.
    • 3.12: If a player does not reach a minimum of 15 posts by the end of a complete day cycle, they will be replaced. I will warn you in PMs if you have not reached this minimum 72 hours before the end of the day. This does not count towards your PM prod total.

  • Etiquette
    • 4.1: Do not use inappropriate language.
    • 4.2: Do not make any personal attacks.
    • 4.3: Follow all of the rules.
    • 4.4: Be mature.
    • 4.5: For a minor rule infraction, players can receive up to 2 warnings. All players can receive up to 3 warnings without further punishment. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill level infraction, they will be modkilled or force replaced. Please do not make me modkill you.

  • Moderators/Co-Moderators
    • 5.1: I, candythecorgi, am the moderator of Mafia Game 289.
    • 5.2: My mod colors will be #3D85C6 and #0B5394. Do not attempt to emulate a moderator message.
    • 5.7: The moderator may change the rules at any time.
    • 5.8: The moderator has the last say in interpreting the rules.

  • Read all of the rules.

Setup
This game will use the Matrix15, or Matrix Mayhem 5x5, setup.



The setup is determined by randomly selecting one row or column from the above matrix, and then adding 9 Vanilla Townies and 1 Mafia Goon. This will always result in 12 Town members (3 of which are Power Roles) and 3 Mafia members (1 or 2 of which are Power Roles).
  • For example, if Column A was randomly selected, the setup would be a Town 3-shot Tracker, Town JOAT, Town Odd Night Doctor, 9 Vanilla Townies, Mafia 2-shot Watcher, Mafia Roleblocker, and Mafia Goon.

Mafia flips will only reveal the alignment of the Mafia player, whereas Town flips will reveal the full role of the Town player.
The following roles are non-consecutive (cannot target the same player 2 nights in a row): Town 3-shot Roleblocker and Town Inventor (1x Track, 1x Roleblock.
The following roles are disabled in endgame (deactivated when only one Mafia is alive): Town 3-shot Roleblocker and Town 3-shot Tracker.

Each of the Town JOAT's abilities may only be used once throughout the game.


Role PMs
Refer here for descriptions of all possible roles. If you have further questions, ask me in your role PM.

Each player has a unique flavorname and role PM. Do not claim or otherwise discuss your flavorname in this game thread or any other public threads. This may result in a modkill based on my discretion.

Mafia will receive fakeclaims upon request.

post_rendered:
ꏳꁝꁲꉣꋖꑀꌅ ꀤ: ꑀꀷꑀꃔ

Blood, everywhere. Splashes of crimson soak into the carpet beneath and color the walls above as if this were the painting of a brutal murder-- which, to the man crouching beside my body, it might as well be. I watch his frame shudder with sobs as he bends over my broken limbs, murmuring something that should be unintelligible but instead rings out clear as day: my fault, mine, all mine.


H̵̢͕̤̭̪̯͓̝̖̊ơ̶̰͍̐͛̀̊͑̓̊w̵̨̛̛̥̟̪͇̑̈́̽̓͛̃̅́͜ ̵͖̝̺̟̅̑͊͌̑̊̄̚ḍ̸̋̌́̅͛̌͑̐͋͂i̶̢͎̮̲͐̀͋̄̓̈̓̚͘͝͠d̴̡̺͛͊̉̀̆̆̉̕ ̵͙̯͆̋͒̅̔̕͝͝h̸͍̪̝͓͙̥͆ẻ̷͕̬̞̞̱͍͉̖̀̔̄ͅͅ ̷̦̆̏̂̍̂͑̂͊͗̕͝d̸̙̙̼̹̓̈̌̋ͅo̵̧̹̼̼̣͙͓̞̿̑͆͝͝ ̷̨̗̱̘͇̥̝̦̤͈͑̈̐͂̍͂͝ḭ̷͂͆̚ṭ̵̙̼̙̦̮̊̈́͋̓͐̋̄̚̚͝?̵̲͚͕̘̱̝̓̊̋̽̒͆̚


The land of gods is just as I remember it: desolate, boring, a white void that extends into infinity without ever doing the self-reflection needed to realize no one would notice if it stopped. Jagged would-be trees jut out of the rift between heaven and hell, real life and fantasy. Giant chains fade into and out of sight, giving the illusion of time passing. A small assortment of eldritch beings sprawl out along their path. Eyes everywhere flutter shut, some in euphoria, some in pain.

I lift my right arm until the chain around it flashes, locking me into place for a second or millennia and rendering me half-blind. Around a ninety-degree angle.

To think I dared to dream of escaping this place.


H̶̪̲̟̬̮͍̬̯̗͔̽̈́͋̈͗͐̎͌̚̚͜͝͝o̷̼͉͕̱̟̍͋̔́̈́̅̏͒́͜ẉ̸̢̟͕̰̯̫̠̹̤͕̗̬̇́̔̆̾́̒͆͒̚͝͝ ̷̧̨̖̯̙̘̲̘̖͓̤̯̳̔͌̈́̄̾͌̐̓̈́̒̓ḍ̶̛̞͉̏̒͊̏̿͗̃͜͝ï̷̱͉͎̠̺͍̤̖̎́͐͂̉̔̆̋̈́̋̕̚d̵̖̿̉͌̎̄̑̎̓͠ ̸̧̨̧͓̗̤̣̯͔̗̋̉͊̃̽̐̕͘͠h̷̡̘̟͎̲̯̯͇̫̰̱͕͌̋̊̽̈́ȩ̵̗͉̗̲̜̜̣̟̰̖̦̬́̎͊͆̓̅͊̽͛̅̌̿ ̶̞̖͚̅̂d̷̢̝͚̞̺͊̏̄͂o̸̖̠̩͈̓̐̔̄̏̓̏͆̍̄ ̴͍͚̥̮͙̰̩͓̿̆̇͋͂̊͂̓̅͜ì̵̪͍̬̟̟͇͋t̶̡͖̿̀̈́̍?̴̧̨͚̓͋͋̏͘


I turn, slowly. The glimmering man I once knew has been transformed into a deer-like creature with curtains of white cloth and cobwebs hanging from its antlers, disrupted only by streaks of bright red. I knew already, for the image had appeared in my dreams and burned itself into my retinas in my first nights as a mortal-- before Sleep gave up bargaining and moved onto anger, or mourning, or the next victim in the perpetual cycle. But centuries of life among the fragile hearts of men have made my heart more fragile still.

In the end, I cannot bear to look at him. I lower my head. ꋖꁝꑀ ꒦ꑀꈜꈜꑀ꒒ ꁅꌅꑀꅐ ꋖ꒐ꌅꑀꀷ. ꒐ꋖ ꅐꁲꈜ ꃳꊿꌈꃔꀷ ꋖꊿ ꃳꌅꑀꁲꈵ ꌈꃔꀷꑀꌅ ꉣꌅꑀꈜꈜꌈꌅꑀ.

Ḩ̸̝̟̘̳͖̖̇͛̽͘m̴̛̝̪̞̭͎͖̖̟m̶̛͙̩͗̓̅̎̓̕̚.̴̨̧͎̞̞͖̦̩̅̌̂́̌͂͛̕͠͠ͅ


ꀷꊿ ꃔꊿꋖ ꋖꁝ꒐ꃔꈵ ꊿꊯ ꒐ꋖ, I warn. ꉣ꒐ꏳꈵ ꁲꃔꊿꋖꁝꑀꌅ, ꒐ꊯ ꐔꊿꌈ ꂵꌈꈜꋖ. ꂵꐔ ꉣꊿꅐꑀꌅ ꅐ꒐꒒꒒ ꀷꊿ ꐔꊿꌈ ꃔꊿ ꁅꊿꊿꀷ.

Ỳ̴̹͓̟̟̰̈́̈́o̷͍͓̺̪͆̓͆͋̽́͝u̶̠̒͐̂̚ ̶̤̒͊͘c̸̢̠͕̝̞̲͋̓̾̎̌ͅá̶̖͋̂̈́͝͝n̵̦̟͂͑̓̇̈́ ̵̲͇͔̙̪̖͙̄̿̕e̷͎̼͍̻̬͍̔͂̀̄n̷̺͚̮̙͛̄͆̿̾̋͌t̸̡͈̣͚͛̊̈̉͗͘e̴͕̞̺͌̓̓r̵̥̈̒̍͋̓͠ ̸̡̓̈̂̔t̵̫̮͚͈͔̙͂̀̒͋̽͘͝ḩ̸̟̯͔̳̪̩͋̈̎̃̀̊̐e̶̢͓͔͕͒ ̷̖̫͕̄͐͝d̴̛̻̉̍r̷̹̦̂̆̈́̀e̴̮̟̲͍̎̀̒̆̒͊͠a̸̪̮͚̞̘͓͑̊͑͌m̷͓̟̎̓̎͘̚͝͝ ̶̢̢͚̗̘̣̏̓̈́w̷̧͙͓̖͇̞͒̂ó̷̾ͅr̷̺̈́̿̇ḻ̷̳͛̍d̶̘͙͎̗̥̳̯̀̏̔́,̴̹̈͐͊ ̵̛̗̬̪̭̆͑̆̄̌͘č̸̭̱͇̟̳̥̃͊̿͑ͅả̷̲̟͖̥ṅ̵̹̙̣̖̈́͌͆ ̶̪̒̃́́͝ỷ̵̬̓̀͠ó̶͎͓̬̜͙̮͝ű̵͇̮͘͠ ̴̢̦̔͌̐͘ͅṋ̸͙̳̼͌̌̊̒͘͝͝o̴̻͇̔̀̐͘t̸̞̥͎̩͉̰͐̒̌͆̚͝?̸̨̉̌͂


My head snaps up in shock, and my eyes find contact with his. Once warm, they are now reduced to gaps in a fabric mask. I swallow. ꐔꊿꌈ ꅐꁲꃔꋖ ꋖꊿ ꃳꌅ꒐ꃔꁅ ꁝ꒐ꂵ ꁝꑀꌅꑀ?

Antlers incline towards me. H̸̟̙̟̀̈͛͘ȅ̵̳̀̌ ̷̾͜t̶͖̦̗̱͒̽̈́͊h̸̺͛̓̓͝i̴͉̠̾̏͐̒ǹ̸̡̟̖͙̑͛̑̈́͊k̵̨̝̣͊̈́̈͝s̵͙͒̋͑ ̴̯̘̐͆̑̎͝ḧ̵̲͕̭̭́̇e̸͉̪̖̝͌̀̍̇̕ ̶͔̄̈̓̑ȋ̶̦͕̲̞͋̆͐͝ş̶̜̰̝̫̍́͊ ̸͇͓͉̣̈́́ŗ̴̫̭͉͂e̵͓͖͙̭̺̍̑̈͋̌̕ş̸̗͇̹͕͂̒͊̑͘̕p̷̥̎̇͐̔̉͘õ̸̙̳͠n̵̤̳̯͇̪̠̎̔̇̅̅͝s̷͎̦͋̉͗ḭ̸̈́̐̑̉̒b̷̞̾̈́ḽ̵̟̆e̶̜͛͗͛̕͠ ̴̛̙̫̺̭͗̿͆̍f̵̣̌ö̴̢̯̌́̍͛ͅȓ̵̯͓̍̐̈́͐̑ͅͅ ̸̡͚̟̗̼͐h̸̥̩͗̓̅͛í̵̢̡̯ş̶̬̣̺̃̀ ̴̨̞̘͓̂͘l̷̰̠̱̳̜͑̔̽o̶͇̼̗̼͕̓ṽ̴͉͚̺̏͌͝ȇ̸̝̳̼̰͆̆̓͆r̵̝̻̣͔̊'̴̲̒ś̴̛̤̲̝̜̺̒̎ͅ ̸͈͕̤͚͔̥͛́͒͂͒̕ď̶͚̲ȩ̶́̋ͅä̷͚̗͋̇̃̿̄t̴̪͖̞͖͔͊͗̔̅ḧ̷̡̧̧͙̣.̶̢̹̤̐̂ ̶̮͎̝̺̈́̉̍ͅH̴̛͓̲̋ē̷̫̚ ̴̨͓̝̠͇̠͊̈͗̃̌n̸̯͗̍̆̀͘è̵͖̏̊̏̉̕e̶̼͗͆̑d̶̟̩͛s̸̻̠͉̜̘̥̓ ̴̨̟̟̌́́̀̈́t̸̲̣̀̎̅̇̕͠r̶̠̜͚͗͗̓̇͛͘a̴̝͓͕̰͔̾n̴͕͖̬̥͛͋̀͘q̸̱́́̀ụ̷̢̖̦̮̜̍̑̊͝ḭ̵̧̻̭̼̈́̊̔͗͘͜͠l̸͉̾̍ǐ̴͖̪̼͒̋̕t̴̨̨͔͎͆͋̀y̵̯̙̪̞̰̏̒̏̋̓.̶͔̠͐ ̴̢̛̮͇̟̋̊͝͝͠F̵̭͌͘̕o̸̤̰̥̲͙̘͛r̸͚̹̜̩̬̎͝g̷̗̳̙̹͂͘i̷͈͍̟͒̓v̷̡̛̐̕e̸̛̲̰͈̗̪̱̿͛̓͝n̵̝̝̍̍̒ẽ̶͔̬̈̅̆͗̌s̶͔̬̾̈́ş̴̧̛̜̒̓͜.̷̳̤́̊̕ ̶̭͋͝P̵̖͙͚͔̱̾̄͘e̶͉̿͛ǎ̸̡͙̰̰̮̝͂̽̇ć̷̜̯̪́̈́̀͘͝e̸̱̻̎̾͗̋͌̈́.̴̖̙̙̳̂͐͂͋͌͝

ꃔꊿꃳꊿꀷꐔ ꃔꑀꑀꀷꈜ ꋖꁝ꒐ꈜ. ꐔꊿꌈ ꐔꊿꌈꌅꈜꑀ꒒ꊯ ꁲꌅꑀ ꁲꋖꋖꑀꂵꉣꋖ꒐ꃔꁅ ꋖꊿ ꀷꑀꈜꏳꑀꃔꀷ.

Ì̸̡̝̩̱̻̈́͂̈́̑͗͐̚ ̵̝̥͈͔̯̺̣̰̝̀͗̈́͐́͝ȟ̸̡͆̔͑̎̃a̵̮͍̪̞͛̽̚̕v̵̪͈̣̼͈̺̀̓͑̌̀͘͝ĕ̶͍̞̃͐̓͑͊ ̵̠̪͇̰̍̈̏̑͑̚͜d̵̛̩̼̰͎̼̟̣͛̂̂͗͗̉͊̈́͜ï̴̡̮͇̰̽f̴̨̲̬̳͠f̸̨̺̝̙̙͗͒̈̆̈́͘͘e̶̞̊͋̀̿̕͠r̴̛̞̰̹͖̩̩͍̓̓́͘ē̸͇̜̟̺̊́ͅn̷̡͎̼̲̠̆̈́̿t̵̢̟͆͆̈́͒̔͗̐ ̸̳͉̰͋̉̾̆n̵̡̛̞̪͎̾͑̑̍̄͗͛ȅ̶̛̖̱͍̞͔̰̳̊̋͆̐̔̾ȩ̸͙͍̬̳̬̺̥̓̿̏͌͝d̷̯̹̃š̶̡͈̥͚͚͚͐͐͘.̵̤̓̇̓̉̎̂


I had expected Sleep to be more malicious in intention. More angry with me. To hate me more. The realization that he isn't and the unsettling calm in those vacant eyes, which should further my guilt, only serve as further proof that the dream world can turn anyone into a god.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ?

He thinks he is responsible for his lover's death. It is not a false notion.

My eyes, still human, must have revealed that sentiment with my words. It was the wrong thing to say-- despair fills me, and all at once the sweetest consolation prize, that there is a wrong thing to say. I reach out, at a loss for words to salvage any possible retreat, but the ninety-degree angle of a newborn is nothing compared to the three strides Sleep is able to take away from me with not another sound.

I draw in a slow breath, then let it out, trying not to crumple to the ground in fear it would upset my bindings. Who am I to beg the one I chained here to spare another from the same fate? But that is what sentiment has reduced me to now.

In moments, the vessel appears next to Sleep, a startling drop of softness and color. Murmurs ripple through the surrounding landscape. Gods visit humans in their dreams, not the other way around. The first time a god sacrificed himself to a human, when Cleopatra ruled the earth and an orderly council the dream world, it was voted upon unanimously that the best course of action was to let the mortal perish in its due. There is no cause not to choose another, they reasoned. Better not to temper with the impulse of the earthling combined with the power of the divine. Better we don't know what it can do.

Without a council, no one cares enough to interrupt as the vessel-- for that is all it is now-- looks around in wonder and drops to its knees.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ, ꈜꐔ꒒꒦ꑀꈜꋖꑀꌅ!

No one interrupts as Sleep, gathering some of the tendrils cloaking his form into a hand-like structure, places it on the vessel's head.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ...

By the time a gently pulsing orb starts orbiting the antlers and singing a high-pitched lullaby in my voice, only the youngest gods are awake to witness it. Those with the power to dream have already fallen back into their own utopias.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ.

Blood, everywhere. Splashes of crimson soak into the carpet beneath and color the walls above as if this were the painting of a brutal murder-- which, to the man crouching beside my body, it might as well be. I watch his frame shudder with sobs as he bends over my broken limbs, murmuring something that should be unintelligible but instead rings out clear as day: [i]my fault, mine, all mine.[/i]


H̵̢͕̤̭̪̯͓̝̖̊ơ̶̰͍̐͛̀̊͑̓̊w̵̨̛̛̥̟̪͇̑̈́̽̓͛̃̅́͜ ̵͖̝̺̟̅̑͊͌̑̊̄̚ḍ̸̋̌́̅͛̌͑̐͋͂i̶̢͎̮̲͐̀͋̄̓̈̓̚͘͝͠d̴̡̺͛͊̉̀̆̆̉̕ ̵͙̯͆̋͒̅̔̕͝͝h̸͍̪̝͓͙̥͆ẻ̷͕̬̞̞̱͍͉̖̀̔̄ͅͅ ̷̦̆̏̂̍̂͑̂͊͗̕͝d̸̙̙̼̹̓̈̌̋ͅo̵̧̹̼̼̣͙͓̞̿̑͆͝͝ ̷̨̗̱̘͇̥̝̦̤͈͑̈̐͂̍͂͝ḭ̷͂͆̚ṭ̵̙̼̙̦̮̊̈́͋̓͐̋̄̚̚͝?̵̲͚͕̘̱̝̓̊̋̽̒͆̚

H̸̟̙̟̀̈͛͘ȅ̵̳̀̌ ̷̾͜t̶͖̦̗̱͒̽̈́͊h̸̺͛̓̓͝i̴͉̠̾̏͐̒ǹ̸̡̟̖͙̑͛̑̈́͊k̵̨̝̣͊̈́̈͝s̵͙͒̋͑ ̴̯̘̐͆̑̎͝ḧ̵̲͕̭̭́̇e̸͉̪̖̝͌̀̍̇̕ ̶͔̄̈̓̑ȋ̶̦͕̲̞͋̆͐͝ş̶̜̰̝̫̍́͊ ̸͇͓͉̣̈́́ŗ̴̫̭͉͂e̵͓͖͙̭̺̍̑̈͋̌̕ş̸̗͇̹͕͂̒͊̑͘̕p̷̥̎̇͐̔̉͘õ̸̙̳͠n̵̤̳̯͇̪̠̎̔̇̅̅͝s̷͎̦͋̉͗ḭ̸̈́̐̑̉̒b̷̞̾̈́ḽ̵̟̆e̶̜͛͗͛̕͠ ̴̛̙̫̺̭͗̿͆̍f̵̣̌ö̴̢̯̌́̍͛ͅȓ̵̯͓̍̐̈́͐̑ͅͅ ̸̡͚̟̗̼͐h̸̥̩͗̓̅͛í̵̢̡̯ş̶̬̣̺̃̀ ̴̨̞̘͓̂͘l̷̰̠̱̳̜͑̔̽o̶͇̼̗̼͕̓ṽ̴͉͚̺̏͌͝ȇ̸̝̳̼̰͆̆̓͆r̵̝̻̣͔̊'̴̲̒ś̴̛̤̲̝̜̺̒̎ͅ ̸͈͕̤͚͔̥͛́͒͂͒̕ď̶͚̲ȩ̶́̋ͅä̷͚̗͋̇̃̿̄t̴̪͖̞͖͔͊͗̔̅ḧ̷̡̧̧͙̣.̶̢̹̤̐̂ ̶̮͎̝̺̈́̉̍ͅH̴̛͓̲̋ē̷̫̚ ̴̨͓̝̠͇̠͊̈͗̃̌n̸̯͗̍̆̀͘è̵͖̏̊̏̉̕e̶̼͗͆̑d̶̟̩͛s̸̻̠͉̜̘̥̓ ̴̨̟̟̌́́̀̈́t̸̲̣̀̎̅̇̕͠r̶̠̜͚͗͗̓̇͛͘a̴̝͓͕̰͔̾n̴͕͖̬̥͛͋̀͘q̸̱́́̀ụ̷̢̖̦̮̜̍̑̊͝ḭ̵̧̻̭̼̈́̊̔͗͘͜͠l̸͉̾̍ǐ̴͖̪̼͒̋̕t̴̨̨͔͎͆͋̀y̵̯̙̪̞̰̏̒̏̋̓.̶͔̠͐ ̴̢̛̮͇̟̋̊͝͝͠F̵̭͌͘̕o̸̤̰̥̲͙̘͛r̸͚̹̜̩̬̎͝g̷̗̳̙̹͂͘i̷͈͍̟͒̓v̷̡̛̐̕e̸̛̲̰͈̗̪̱̿͛̓͝n̵̝̝̍̍̒ẽ̶͔̬̈̅̆͗̌s̶͔̬̾̈́ş̴̧̛̜̒̓͜.̷̳̤́̊̕ ̶̭͋͝P̵̖͙͚͔̱̾̄͘e̶͉̿͛ǎ̸̡͙̰̰̮̝͂̽̇ć̷̜̯̪́̈́̀͘͝e̸̱̻̎̾͗̋͌̈́.̴̖̙̙̳̂͐͂͋͌͝

ꃔꊿꃳꊿꀷꐔ ꃔꑀꑀꀷꈜ ꋖꁝ꒐ꈜ. ꐔꊿꌈ ꐔꊿꌈꌅꈜꑀ꒒ꊯ ꁲꌅꑀ ꁲꋖꋖꑀꂵꉣꋖ꒐ꃔꁅ ꋖꊿ ꀷꑀꈜꏳꑀꃔꀷ.

Ì̸̡̝̩̱̻̈́͂̈́̑͗͐̚ ̵̝̥͈͔̯̺̣̰̝̀͗̈́͐́͝ȟ̸̡͆̔͑̎̃a̵̮͍̪̞͛̽̚̕v̵̪͈̣̼͈̺̀̓͑̌̀͘͝ĕ̶͍̞̃͐̓͑͊ ̵̠̪͇̰̍̈̏̑͑̚͜d̵̛̩̼̰͎̼̟̣͛̂̂͗͗̉͊̈́͜ï̴̡̮͇̰̽f̴̨̲̬̳͠f̸̨̺̝̙̙͗͒̈̆̈́͘͘e̶̞̊͋̀̿̕͠r̴̛̞̰̹͖̩̩͍̓̓́͘ē̸͇̜̟̺̊́ͅn̷̡͎̼̲̠̆̈́̿t̵̢̟͆͆̈́͒̔͗̐ ̸̳͉̰͋̉̾̆n̵̡̛̞̪͎̾͑̑̍̄͗͛ȅ̶̛̖̱͍̞͔̰̳̊̋͆̐̔̾ȩ̸͙͍̬̳̬̺̥̓̿̏͌͝d̷̯̹̃š̶̡͈̥͚͚͚͐͐͘.̵̤̓̇̓̉̎̂


I had expected Sleep to be more malicious in intention. More angry with me. To hate me more. The realization that he isn't and the unsettling calm in those vacant eyes, which should further my guilt, only serve as further proof that the dream world can turn anyone into a god.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ?

[i]He thinks he is responsible for his lover's death.[/i] It is not a false notion.

My eyes, still human, must have revealed that sentiment with my words. It was the wrong thing to say-- despair fills me, and all at once the sweetest consolation prize, that there [i]is[/i] a wrong thing to say. I reach out, at a loss for words to salvage any possible retreat, but the ninety-degree angle of a newborn is nothing compared to the three strides Sleep is able to take away from me with not another sound.

I draw in a slow breath, then let it out, trying not to crumple to the ground in fear it would upset my bindings. Who am I to beg the one I chained here to spare another from the same fate? But that is what sentiment has reduced me to now.[/color]

[color=#0B5394]In moments, the vessel appears next to Sleep, a startling drop of softness and color. Murmurs ripple through the surrounding landscape. Gods visit humans in their dreams, not the other way around. The first time a god sacrificed himself to a human, when Cleopatra ruled the earth and an orderly council the dream world, it was voted upon unanimously that the best course of action was to let the mortal perish in its due. There is no cause not to choose another, they reasoned. Better not to temper with the impulse of the earthling combined with the power of the divine. Better we don't know what it can do.

Without a council, no one cares enough to interrupt as the vessel-- for that is all it is now-- looks around in wonder and drops to its knees.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ, ꈜꐔ꒒꒦ꑀꈜꋖꑀꌅ!

No one interrupts as Sleep, gathering some of the tendrils cloaking his form into a hand-like structure, places it on the vessel's head.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ...

By the time a gently pulsing orb starts orbiting the antlers and singing a high-pitched lullaby in my voice, only the youngest gods are awake to witness it. Those with the power to dream have already fallen back into their own utopias.

ꉣ꒒ꑀꁲꈜꑀ.
[/color]

Bosnia, a land rich in history, culture, and diversity, serves as the backdrop for an intriguing tapestry of affiliations among fifteen individuals, each with unique backgrounds and connections to this captivating nation. From the bustling streets of Sarajevo to the tranquil beauty of the countryside, these individuals embody the spirit of Bosnia in their own distinct ways.

Among them, aayr emerges as a passionate advocate for Bosnian art and literature, actively promoting local artists and writers on social media platforms. Their dedication to preserving and celebrating Bosnia's cultural heritage makes them a prominent figure in the country's artistic community.

NDMath, a brilliant mathematician, has conducted groundbreaking research in Bosnia, advancing the frontiers of science and technology. Their work has garnered international acclaim and positioned Bosnia as a hub for innovation and scientific inquiry.

the reason radio is town is because they are stuck too much inside their own head.

see, wolfy reactions that are actually coming from a wolf exist. they really do. but they're wolfy reactions because they blatantly display self-preservation instincts that only mafia have... except town have those instincts too.

the difference is that when town go into this self-preservation state, they are stuck inside their head, for a lack of a better way to say it, they are not primarily focused on finding the best way to stay alive, they instead go into more of a thought spew kind of thing, they are more blatantly inconsistent, etc etc. meanwhile mafia are more agendaed and deliberate with what they do, they are slightly cleaner and advance more of a singular narrative.

unsure how to say it better, but i think radio fits into the town self-preservation model much better

post_rendered:
i think that saturn's play this game can be summed up by "i'm going to solve this game fast and impressively" which obviously is a town thing to think

but, mafia can also attempt to fake that state of mind, and i don't think anything saturn's done has really convinced me they're genuinely thinking like that

...except one thing, the part where they said they will lowpost. i don't really think they would have come up with this as mafia, the idea is not just telling people they will slank, that's not the point. the point is that one way of trying to solve the game impressively is by solving it in as little posts as possible while still actually playing the game. not to say they don't have other reasons to lowpost, but i think the way they have been approaching the game + the placement of that statement in their post, kind of signals that sort of thing, and i do not think they wouldn't have thought to fake it like that as mafia

i'll think about this a lil more though, it is possible i am reaching
